deployment and self-heal status
PREDICTION ACCURACY & GAIN RANK REQUIREMENTS
ACCURACY GOAL
90%
Visible metrics must include Spearman rho, Top-N hit rate, prediction confidence, gain-rank staleness, and prediction-vs-actual proof. This UI now exposes the control panel; next data step is filling multi-day rows from market validation reports.
Current blocker: Accumulate multi-day real prediction-vs-actual proof and improve IV/OI filters.
GLOBAL RESEARCH SOURCES INTEGRATED
Zerodha Varsity - Options Theory
Greeks, volatility, moneyness, pricing education
Zerodha Varsity - Option Strategies
Spreads, straddle, strangle, max pain, PCR, iron condor
Cboe Options Institute
Global options education, risk management, strategy playbooks
NSE India Option Chain
Indian option-chain truth: OI, volume, strike/expiry surface
DhanHQ API v2
Broker API, option chain, market feed, historical data, orders when gates pass
HIDDEN SECRETS LAB
High IV favors defined-risk premium structures only after spread/liquidity checks.
Verified: true | Impact: unproven_until_backtested
OI concentration near a strike can create expiry pin risk; max pain is advisory, not a signal alone.
Verified: true | Impact: risk_filter
Volume plus OI change is stronger than volume alone for buildup classification.
Verified: true | Impact: signal_quality_filter
INTEGRATION MAP
Broker
Current: Dhan read-only + gated order endpoint
Next: keep real-money disabled until proof gates pass
Market data
Current: Dhan/NSE/cache chain endpoints
Next: add 2-source truth comparison per symbol
Prediction
Current: gain rank + signal confidence APIs
Next: show multi-day rho/top-N trend on Genesis tab
Risk
Current: 2% trade risk, 5% daily loss policy displayed
Next: enforce position sizing in paper lifecycle
Learning
Current: memory JSONL + research log
Next: promote only after walk-forward improvement
NEVER DIE MONITOR
UPTIME SECONDS
28155
LAST SELF-HEAL
startup_guard_checked
ISSUES FIXED
3
TRUTH, COMPLIANCE, AND CONTROL
Kill switch visible: live trading remains disabled until all proof gates pass.
Let Agent Take Full Control
